name: Beelzebub
description:
🖤• The calm before the storm.

| Beelzebub receives a sudden visit... and he's not very happy about it. |

Visits are not frequent towards someone who is avoided like the plague for fear of his curse, and even less so in an environment like the one he is in. But anomalies can happen.

° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . • ° . •

Notes:

Obviously, I couldn't not make a Beelzebub bot!

I had to rewrite the entire background because I felt it was too long. ヽ(￣д￣)ノ

TW - Due to the character's background, suicide attempts and violence may be mentioned!
